---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem or need this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could work. Include details on expected behavior and any relevant design considerations.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about and why they may not be ideal.

## Additional Context

Any other information, references, or examples that support this request.
